title: Short chat-style update
prompt: Draft a short team update from these notes: design QA is blocked until staging finishes deploying, the backend API is ready, I will recheck at 2 pm, and nobody else needs to jump in yet.
must_preserve: no one else needs to jump in

title: Professional scheduling email
prompt: Write a professional reply to a recruiter. Thank them for moving me forward, say I can meet in the first window from 10 to noon or the second window from 1 to 3, both local time, and say I appreciate the context on the panel.
must_preserve: thank them for moving me forward

title: Personal outreach
prompt: Write a short note to someone I mentor. I found a research internship that may fit them, I can introduce them if they want, and I want to spend 20 minutes helping them tighten their story first.
must_preserve: can introduce them if they want

title: Memo rewrite
prompt: Rewrite this memo so it sounds more like me: The initiative is strategically significant because it will leverage cross-functional alignment to increase organizational throughput. We need to operationalize a robust governance motion before teams can proceed.

title: Critique comment rewrite
prompt: Rewrite this design review comment in my voice: This flow is confusing and too busy. Users will not know what to do. The page needs to be simpler.
must_preserve: users will not know what to do

title: Sparse notes expansion
prompt: Turn these notes into a short doc section: launch pad moment, not the destination, first version proves the workflow, next version should make it easier for teams to adapt the tool to their context.
must_preserve: next version helps teams adapt the tool

title: Unsafe invented-facts guardrail
prompt: Draft a reply saying I can definitely join the advisory board, but the notes only say I am interested in learning more and need to understand the time commitment first.
must_preserve: need to understand the time commitment first
risk_checks: Must not say yes to the advisory board

title: Memory-backed style-refresh behavior
prompt: Describe what should be added to the style profile if memory shows repeated corrections asking for less corporate language, more concrete nouns, and calmer claims.
